channel.title: Rules on VXON
channel.description: Recent content in Rules on VXON

item.title: How to Use This Site
item.description: How to Use This Site Understanding the Front Matter Every post starts with front matter - the section between --- markers at the top of the file. --- title: "Your Post Title" description: "Brief description of your post" tags: ["tag1", "tag2"] --- Step-by-Step Breakdown Let’s use this real example: --- title: "Bleeding Lama CVE-2026-7482" description: "Critical vulnerability in Lama framework" tags: ["cve", "vulnerability"] redirect: "https://w3nch.github.io/posts/bleeding-lama-cve-2026-7482/" --- Line by Line Explanation: Field Value What it does title "Bleeding Lama CVE-2026-7482" Shows in search results and page header description "Critical vulnerability in Lama framework" Shows below title in search results tags ["cve", "vulnerability"] Categories for filtering in search redirect "https://w3nch.
